description: NeuralDebug tool definitions for OpenAI function calling (ChatGPT, Codex, GPT-based agents). Import these as the 'tools' array in your API call.

function.name: NeuralDebug_start_server
function.description: Launch a debug server for a target program. Supports Python, C/C++, C#, Rust, Java, Go, Node.js, and Ruby. Auto-compiles source files with debug symbols if needed. The server persists until explicitly stopped.

target.description: Path to source file or executable to debug (e.g., 'main.py', 'server.c', 'app.exe')

language.description: Target language (auto-detected from file extension if omitted)

port.description: TCP port for the debug server. Defaults: Python=5678, C#=5679, Rust=5680, Java=5681, Go=5682, Node.js=5683, Ruby=5684

program_args.description: Arguments to pass to the debugged program

function.name: NeuralDebug_set_breakpoint
function.description: Set a breakpoint at a line number, function name, or file:line location.

location.description: Line number (42), function name (main), or file:line (source.c:42)

function.name: NeuralDebug_start_execution
function.description: Start program execution. Pauses at first breakpoint or first line (Python).

action.description: step_over: next line; step_in: enter function; step_out: exit function

function.name: NeuralDebug_continue
function.description: Continue execution until the next breakpoint or program completion.

function.name: NeuralDebug_inspect
function.description: Inspect all local variables in the current scope. Returns names, types, and values.

function.name: NeuralDebug_evaluate
function.description: Evaluate an expression in the current debugging context (e.g., 'len(items)', 'ptr->data', 'x + y').

function.name: NeuralDebug_backtrace
function.description: Show the full call stack at the current execution point.

function.name: NeuralDebug_list_code
function.description: Show source code around the current execution point.

function.name: NeuralDebug_stop
function.description: Stop the debug server and end the debugging session.
